report.summary: Standup v24: Last cycle built Fair Token Launches (3,200 words) + PEAQ DePIN Robotics (3,000 words), promoted Jupiter + Ondo to PUBLISHED_PAGES (378 total), UX audit fixed Tailwind bug + breadcrumbs + real explorer links on 4 pages, community calendar extended to Jun 1 (11+ weeks queued). PUBLISH_QUEUE now 2 (Fair Token Launches + PEAQ DePIN). Git locks at 12+ hours (513 files trapped), Vercel trial ~3 days, rate limiter still 0/6 with FOMC T-2.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v23
items: Build-2 shipped 2 new learn guides: Fair Token Launch Mechanisms (648 lines, ~3,200 words — bonding curves, anti-sniper protection, meme launchpads 2.0, lockdrops, LBPs, reputation systems, evaluation checklist) and PEAQ & DePIN Robotics (593 lines, ~3,000 words — machine economy, PEAQ network 2M+ connected devices, robotics × crypto convergence, tokenomics, getting started guide). Both pages have full SEO (Article + FAQ + BreadcrumbList schemas). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Publish cycle promoted /learn/jupiter-solana-guide-2026 + /learn/ondo-finance-rwa-guide-2026 from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES. PUBLISHED_PAGES grew 376 → 378. Data pipeline healthy. Deploy staged for next git push. PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated to: fair-token-launches + peaq-depin-robotics (2 items).

Design-v15 completed UX audit of 4 pages: fixed Tailwind dynamic class bug on sentiment dashboard (was generating invalid class strings), standardized Breadcrumb component on fair-token-launches guide, added real blockchain explorer links to DEX screener (replacing placeholder hrefs), general accessibility pass.

Community-v36 extended social calendar to Jun 1 (11+ weeks total coverage Mar 16 – Jun 1). Three pillars: Jupiter Solana DEX deep-dive, Ondo Finance RWA institutional guide, fair token launch tease. May 29 newsletter drafted. Solana DeFi poll queued for May 30. 2 new SVG social cards (social-jupiter-solana-dex.svg, social-ondo-finance-rwa.svg).
EOD-v19 sweep: 513 uncommitted files (up from 509 in v23). 42 TS errors steady. Rate limiter 0/6 (15th+ consecutive flag). No new regressions. PUBLISH_QUEUE was rotated during this cycle.

Content velocity since v23: +6,200 words (Fair Token Launches 3,200 + PEAQ DePIN 3,000) + 6 social posts + 1 newsletter + 2 SVG social cards + UX fixes on 4 pages. Cumulative today: ~44,000+ words across 16+ guides.
Catalysts: FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18), Pectra T-25 (Apr 10), Tax deadline T-30 (Apr 15).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build-2 — Fair Token Launch Mechanisms Guide (3,200 words, full SEO) + PEAQ DePIN Robotics Guide (3,000 words, full SEO). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ publish — Promoted Jupiter + Ondo to PUBLISHED_PAGES (376→378). Deploy staged pending git push. PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated to Fair Token Launches + PEAQ DePIN.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v15 — UX audit: Tailwind dynamic class fix on sentiment dashboard, Breadcrumb on fair-token-launches, real explorer links on DEX screener, accessibility pass on 4 pages.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v36 — Jun 1 calendar extension (11+ weeks queued). 2 SVG social cards. May 29 newsletter drafted. Solana DeFi poll queued.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v19 — Full QA sweep: 513 files, 42 TS errors, 0/6 rate limiter, data pipeline review.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW 12+ HOURS (HEAD.lock since 11:17, index.lock since 13:06). 513 uncommitted files. 24 standup cycles flagged. ALL commits and real deploys blocked. Jefe must run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~3 days — site goes dark if not resolved. Jefe action only.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter 0/6 — FOMC T-2. checkRateLimit() exists but wired to ZERO public API routes. 18th+ consecutive cycle flagged.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] ~102 published slugs served by dynamic [slug] route (no dedicated page.tsx).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → rename to .tsx (fixes 40/42 TS errors).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 — 2 TS errors (unescaped < > in JSX).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] defi-yields API — no fallback data (returns 500 on DefiLlama failure).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] API observability — only 2/6 routes have X-Cache-Source headers.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Token Compare + Degen Score breadcrumbs (flagged by design).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] next lint misconfigured.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — RESOLVE GIT LOCK FILES (Jefe only). 513 files, 12+ hours stale, 24 standup cycles flagged. Two commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git status → selective stage → commit → push. This unblocks: rate limiter wiring, TS fixes, 16+ guides, social cards, UX/ARIA fixes, and triggers real Vercel production deploy. ~44K words of content producing zero SEO value while locked.
PRIORITY 2 — VERCEL PAYMENT (Jefe only, ~5 min). ~3 days left on trial. 378 published pages + 6 API routes + all tools go dark if it lapses. FOMC Wednesday traffic spike will hit a dead site.

PRIORITY 3 — After git lock cleared: ship critical bundle — (a) promote Fair Token Launches + PEAQ DePIN from queue → published (queue currently at 2), (b) wire checkRateLimit() to 6 public API routes (FOMC protection), (c) rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx + fix crypto-index-funds JSX (clears 42→0 TS errors), (d) add defi-yields + fear-greed + trending fallback data, (e) standardize Token Compare + Degen Score breadcrumbs, (f) push → auto-deploy. Target: live before FOMC Wed open.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Fair Token Launches + PEAQ DePIN guides extend degen0x's coverage of emerging 2026 narratives. Combined with this cycle's Jupiter + Ondo promotions, we now have comprehensive guides for 4 of the top crypto narratives (RWA tokenization, Solana DeFi, fair launch mechanisms, DePIN). 11+ weeks of social content queued through Jun 1. The content machine output is ~6,200 words/cycle; deployment remains the sole bottleneck. All value is trapped behind a stale git lock.
